## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 🛠️ Type of Change

Please mark the options that are relevant:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (updates to README, docs/, or comments)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance optimization / refactoring

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Lint checks**: Ran `npm run lint` and resolved all warnings.
- [ ] **Compilation**: Ran `npm run build` and verified the production build compiles successfully.
- [ ] **Manual verification**: Verified UI/API functionality locally (e.g. adding friend, scanning receipt, simplicity calculation).

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (inside `docs/` or `README.md`).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have verified that no sensitive keys, passwords, or AWS secrets are committed.
